fields.name: Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the entry, as assigned from the specified number series when the entry was created.

fields.name: VAT Registration No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT registration number that you entered in the VAT Registration No. field on a customer, vendor, or contact card.

fields.name: Account Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the account type of the customer or vendor whose VAT registration number is verified.

fields.name: Account No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the account number of the customer or vendor whose VAT registration number is verified.

fields.name: Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the country/region of the address.

fields.name: User ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the user who posted the entry, to be used, for example, in the change log.

fields.name: Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies the status of the verification action.

fields.name: Verified Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the customer, vendor, or contact whose VAT registration number was verified.

fields.name: Verified Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the address of the customer, vendor, or contact whose VAT registration number was verified.

fields.name: Verified Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies when the VAT registration number was verified.

fields.name: Request Identifier
fields.tooltip: Specifies the request identifier of the VAT registration number validation service.

fields.name: Verified Street
fields.tooltip: Specifies the street of the customer, vendor, or contact whose VAT registration number was verified.

fields.name: Verified Postcode
fields.tooltip: Specifies the postcode of the customer, vendor, or contact whose VAT registration number was verified.

fields.name: Verified City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city of the customer, vendor, or contact whose VAT registration number was verified.

fields.name: Details Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies the status of the details validation.
